notes: War begins. Minab school strike reported — initial casualty figures unclear. Khamenei confirmed dead.
6 US KIA at Shuaiba, Kuwait. 10 seriously wounded. Minab school death toll rises to 165. Gandhi Hospital struck.
Iran Health Minister: ~700 dead. White House: 49 senior leaders killed. Austin TX: 3 dead. India: first casualty on MKD VYOM.
US claims 1,500+ IRGC killed. E3 enters war. IRGC C2 destroyed.
Iran total 1,045+. Lebanon 154 dead. IRIS Dena sunk (crew status unknown). F-35 first air-to-air kill.
Iran dead 1,230. Israel: 12 dead, 11 missing, 777 hospitalized. UAE: 3+/94+ wounded. Kuwait: 3/32+. Bahrain: 1/6. India: 5. Pakistan: 23. Iraq: 13. Syria: 4.
Lebanon jumps to 217 dead (+63 from Dahiya). 798 wounded. 95,000 displaced. 700,000 affected by Beirut evacuation.

source: Iranian Red Crescent, UNICEF, WHO, multiple governments
notes: Iran: 1,332 dead (Red Crescent), 6,000+ wounded. UNICEF: 181 children. 4 schools hit. 3,090 residential + 528 commercial units. 13 medical facilities (WHO). Lebanon: 217 dead, 798 wounded. Israel: 12 dead, 11 missing, 777 hospitalized. US: 6 KIA, 10 seriously wounded. UAE: 3+/94+. Kuwait: 3/32+. Qatar: 0/16. Bahrain: 1/6. Austin TX: 3. India: 5. Pakistan: 23. Iraq: 13. Syria: 4.
